sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12329" key="a)pogalhni/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπογᾰληνίζω</orth>, <sense id="n12329.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">calm down,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑαυτόν</foreign> prob. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.655b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
